content.en:
"Our Ghost Fox Organization admits defeat, and the challenge is over!"

The Sparrow Battle Domain Ancestor said angrily.

"I'm sorry, the challenge can't end casually!" the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor shook his head, "Besides, whether the challenge ends or not, I don't have the right to decide, that's the matter of the Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestor!"

The Sparrow Battle Domain Ancestor looked at Ye Tian: "Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestors, end the challenge immediately!"

The reason why he was so eager to end the challenge was because the Qingyang Domain Ancestor was in danger.

The Qingyang Domain Ancestor condensed the Holy Soul, a Holy Soul-level Supreme Domain Ancestor, which was too important to the Ghost Fox Organization.

Even if he was unhappy with the Qingyang Domain Ancestor, he would definitely not dare to trap a Holy Soul-level Supreme Domain Ancestor to death, otherwise once the leader became angry, he would not be able to bear the anger.

Therefore, the Qingyang Domain Ancestor cannot fall.

Ye Tian heard the summons of the Sparrow Battle Domain Ancestor, but he ignored it, and he didn't even stop moving, he was still attacking the Sparrow War Domain Ancestor, vowing to kill the Sparrow War Domain Ancestor.

As time passed, the injuries of the Sparrow Battle Domain Ancestor became more and more serious.

At this moment, the Bird War Domain Ancestor once again urged the Taichen Sword Projection Sword, but it still failed to break through Ye Tian's Eternal Cover.

He even used the Cause and Effect Divine Technique to no avail, but he couldn't hurt Ye Tian.

The Cause and Effect Sacred Technique works very well on people whose strength is lower than their own, and they can even ignore the distance between the clone and the main body and directly kill their main body.

But if the other party's strength is stronger than his own, the causal holy technique will be useless.

Therefore, the Sacred Technique of Cause and Effect is also known as the most frustrating and terrifying Sacred Technique.

Seeing that the Qingyang Domain Ancestor was about to be unable to support it, the Sparrow Battle Domain Ancestor was also very nervous.

But he didn't dare to make a move, if he did, he could rescue the Qingyang Domain Ancestor in an instant, and even the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor couldn't stop him.

However, once he did so, there was a reason for Zhanmen to do it.

Maybe the Battle Gate won't destroy the Ghost Fox Organization, but it is not difficult to kill an invincible domain ancestor like him.

"Sparrow Battle Domain Ancestor, save me!"

Qingyang Domain Ancestor asked for help.

"You asked me to make a move, now that I'm in danger, you can't see death without help, and I have condensed the Holy Soul, and the leader knows that he will protect me!"

However, no matter how the Qingyang Domain Ancestor asked for help, the Sparrow Battle Domain Ancestor did not dare to make a move.

"Qingyang Domain Ancestor, if you hold on a little longer, the leader is coming!"

Ancestral Dao of the Sparrow War Domain.

He had already summoned the leader, and the leader had learned that the Qingyang Domain Ancestor had condensed the Holy Soul and had now arrived.

He didn't dare to make a move, but if the leader came to save the Qingyang Domain Ancestor, even the Battle Gate would not kill their leader.

Abrupt.

A depressing breath descended.

At this time, the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor's face was extremely heavy.

"Is he coming?"

The Blood Gang Domain Ancestor was shocked.

This so-called him is the leader of the Ghost Fox Organization - Ghost Fox Emperor Ancestor!

The Ghost Fox Emperor Ancestor is also a legendary existence, and his strength is very strong, although he can't be called a more rebellious one among the Superior Domain Ancestors, but it has also been a long time since he was promoted to the Superior Domain Ancestor.

It is rumored that he was one of the children of an ancestor, but he did not possess the Holy Endowment.

There is a certain chance of giving birth to a Saint Fu Heir without a superior domain ancestor and the heir born from the Ancestor, but it is more difficult for the Ancestor to give birth to an heir.

And the Ghost Fox Emperor Ancestor was not born by that ancestor in the Ancestor Realm, but one of the many heirs who were born at the level of his Superior Domain Ancestor.

Of course, this is hearsay, and the veracity cannot be verified.

The Blood Gang Domain Ancestor has never seen this Ghost Fox Emperor Ancestor, after all, everyone's circle is different, the circle of the Ghost Fox Emperor Ancestor is also the circle of the Superior Domain Ancestor, and the circle of the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor is limited to the Invincible Domain Ancestor.

Therefore, he had never seen the Ghost Fox Emperor Ancestor.

But now, a peerless domain ancestor has arrived, and his aura is very unfamiliar, who is it if it is not the Ghost Fox Emperor Ancestor?

Click!

The void cracked, and a strange-looking man stepped out of the void.

He ignored the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor and instead looked at Ye Tian.

With just one glance, Ye Tian seemed to be frozen.

At this moment, the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor couldn't help much.

"That's all for this battle!"

The Ghost Fox Emperor Ancestor spoke.

"No way!"

Ye Tian refused.

"Do you dare to resist me?" the Ghost Fox Emperor Ancestor sneered.

"So what?"

Ye Tiandao.

He is not afraid of the Ghost Fox Emperor Ancestor, not to mention that there is a battle gate standing behind him, just because he is not the main body now, he is not a ghost fox Emperor Ancestor.

The Ghost Fox Emperor Ancestor has no causal talent, so he shouldn't be able to use the Causal Sacred Technique, so the Ghost Fox Emperor Ancestor can't kill him.

Unless the Ghost Fox Emperor Ancestor personally went to the Xuanxu Holy Realm to kill him, but in that case, it would be impossible for the Battle Gate to ignore it.

So, he has nothing to fear.

"You are very bold, do you think I won't dare to kill you? Even if I do kill you, the battle gate will not care! Do you believe it or not?" the Ghost Fox Emperor Ancestor threatened in a cold voice.

"Ghost Fox, who said we don't care about the battle?"

A figure descended.

Then, a figure appeared, and it was one of the deputy masters of the Battle Gate that Ye Tian had ever seen, the Superior Domain Ancestor, the Fire Emblem War Ancestor.

"Fire Pattern Battle Ancestor, won't you go to the Primordial Ancestral Realm?" Ghost Fox Emperor Ancestor frowned, and immediately smiled, "It turned out to be a clone, your doppelganger is only one-third of the combat power of the body, I didn't expect you to actually split a clone to protect this little guy when the body entered the primordial battle realm, it seems that your battle gate really values him very much! Unfortunately, you only came with a clone, could it be that you still want to use a clone to fight against me?"

"Ghost Fox Emperor Ancestor, if it weren't for your father, what do you think you are?"

The words of the Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor also confirmed that the Ghost Fox Emperor Ancestor was indeed the son of the First Ancestor.

At this moment, rumors are no longer rumors, but facts.

"Fire Pattern Battle Ancestor, do you want to fight me?" asked the Ghost Fox Emperor Ancestor.

"If you dare to interfere, I will dare to do it, even if it's just a clone, it won't be a problem to suppress you!" Fire Emblem Zhan Zu said disdainfully.

"Hmph, who wouldn't talk big, although you and I haven't fought each other, but I have been famous for a longer time than you, you are just one of the weakest of the thirteen deputy masters of the Battle Gate, and you are not my opponent with one of your clones!"

"The ignorant are fearless!"

The Fire Emblem War Ancestor made a move.

And before he could make a move, he instantly moved Ye Tian and Xuegang Domain Ancestor away.

And the Ghost Fox Emperor Ancestor also moved the Domain Ancestors of the Ghost Fox Organization, otherwise without the fight of the Superior Domain Ancestors, it would easily affect the other Domain Ancestors, causing the other Domain Ancestors to be annihilated in an instant.

Rumble!!!!!

The aura of the two Peerless Domain Ancestors spread, and the entire sea was in turmoil, and countless Domain Ancestors were panicked and stayed away from this area one after another, so as not to be affected by the fight of the Peerless Domain Ancestors.

Although Ye Tian and the others were moved, they still watched this battle from a long distance.

Ye Tian was also very curious, what was the battle of the Peerless Domain Ancestor like, and how terrifying was the Peerless Domain Ancestor?

And this time, it's an opportunity!
